Nueca Technologies Inc. | Cybersecurity Engineer, Vice Chair — AI Transformation Team, & Compliance Officer for Privacy | Onsite | Jun 2026 - Present
• Serve as Global Administrator for Entra ID, Microsoft 365, and Azure environments for 55 users; enforced Zero-Trust controls that reduced privileged-access vulnerabilities by ~80%.
• Spearheaded a 3-phase AI transformation roadmap across all 5 departments, reaching ~78% AI-assisted workflow adoption among 55 employees within 3 months.

• Maintain and scale 6+ production AI systems including RAG, hybrid OCR, offline transcription, AI orchestration, HR assistant, and email security responder workflows with zero cloud data exposure where required.
Mindrift | AI Engineer (Task-Based, Flexible) — LLM Training & Data | Remote | Nov 2025 - Apr 2026
• Delivered 3,200+ annotated data samples across multiple LLM training task batches.
• Built an automated Python/BeautifulSoup/Selenium scraping pipeline that reduced per-task manual work by ~85%.
• Maintained a 94% task acceptance rate while managing concurrent professional obligations.
Nueca Technologies Inc. | Cybersecurity Associate (Part-Time) | Onsite | Sep 2025 - May 2026
• Administered internal LAN services for 55 employees across 5 departments with segmentation, access control, and 99%+ uptime.
• Managed an additive email security layer that blocked 100+ malicious emails and reduced estimated phishing exposure by ~70%.
• Delivered 3 company-wide cybersecurity orientations covering 100% of staff.
• Appointed Compliance Officer for Privacy and led NPC Seal of Registration submission.
• Provided compensated security consulting for 2 partner organizations with formal risk reports.
• Architected AI orchestration and internal ERP systems for Engineering, Operations, IAM, HR, and asset workflows.
Nueca Technologies Inc. | Network and Cloud Security Analyst Intern | Onsite | May 2025 - Jul 2025
• Audited legacy infrastructure, found 12 segmentation and visibility gaps, and proposed a funded Layer 3 redesign.
• Scanned 3 network segments with Nmap and OpenVAS; delivered a CVSS-prioritized remediation plan for 20+ risks.
• Raised 15 macOS workstations to 82% CIS Benchmark compliance within a 2-week cycle.
• Deployed Wazuh SIEM/HIDS in lab and Kubernetes production environments, supporting logs across 8 nodes.
• Migrated 3 services to Kubernetes with Deployments, Services, RBAC, ConfigMaps, Secrets, probes, HPA, and Ingress.
• Fixed SPF, DKIM, and DMARC DNS gaps and delivered a macOS spyware simulation for 20+ engineering staff.
